2216420.name: Friendship Dungeon: Party Puzzler
2216420.description:
A dungeon crawler where puzzles meet chaos!
Grab your friends (up to 4-player co-op) and dive into a roguelite dungeon where every room is a unique tile-swapping puzzle packed with traps, monsters, and treasures. Work together, shout at each other, and try not to fall into the abyss!

🗝️ Put your friendship to test with:

  • Chaotic Co-op Action – Play solo or with up to 3 friends. Communication is key… or total chaos.

  • Tile-Swap Puzzles – Rearrange dungeon tiles in real-time to open paths, solve riddles, and outsmart traps.

  • Roguelite Progression – Each run is different: new rooms, new puzzles, new surprises.

  • Party Game Energy – Easy to pick up, hard to master. Perfect for couch chaos or online fun.

  • Adorable Yet Deadly – Cartoonish art style hides cunning traps, sneaky monsters, and explosive puzzles.

If you enjoy the cooperative mayhem of Overcooked, Moving Out, or PlateUp! but wish it came with dungeon-crawling puzzles and rogue-lite replayability, Friendship Dungeon: Party Puzzler is for you.

Can your friendships survive the dungeon?
